original_text: Profitability metrics remained robust in Q2 2025, with gross margin at 51.81%, operating margin reaching 11.43%, and net margin at 10.83%. Net income grew 6.05% quarter-over-quarter to $18.2B, indicating effective cost management alongside revenue expansion. The operating income of $19.2B demonstrates the company's ability to convert top-line growth into bottom-line results.
revised_text: Profitability metrics remained robust in Q2 2025, with gross margin at 51.81%, operating margin reaching 11.43%, and net margin at 10.83%. Net income grew 6.05% year-over-year to $18.2B, indicating effective cost management alongside revenue expansion. The operating income of $19.2B demonstrates the company's ability to convert top-line growth into bottom-line results.
changes_summary: Corrected 'quarter-over-quarter' to 'year-over-year' for net income growth to accurately reflect the metric defined in calculation K002, resolving the citation mismatch error identified by the fact-checker.
